signals.headline: Solana X Post Fuels XRP-Solana Integration Speculation, Driving XRP to $1
signals.raw:
Solana X Post Fuels XRP-Solana Integration Speculation, Driving XRP to $1.41 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
A cryptic 4-second video from Solana's official X account featuring the XRP logo—captioned simply "XRP"—has sparked rumors of partnership or integration, with a Solana co-founder hinting at a wrapped XRP version arriving on the platform[1][3][5][8]. This triggered XRP's 4.79% surge to $1.4115 a
